en: Oh, damn, I've never been to a restaurant this nice.
I've never even worked at a restaurant this nice.
My bread, their malt, and all the cake is life-changing.
Oprah says that your birthday dictates the kind of year you're about to have.
I haven't eaten a thing in the past 36 hours
in order to be able to, like, really stuff myself with as much expensive food as possible.
It's gonna raise my market value, like, so much.
I'm gonna have a high, high end year.
I've been overeating this week and then emptying myself with laxatives.
It's been working really well. Too well.
